scope: Cycle 11: Bug hunt C10 (rune activation race condition) + WalkHUD v2 (factions, turn, flash)

bugs_found.description: Race condition in _on_ogham_pressed: choice buttons (_buttons) remain enabled during ogham activation await. Player can press a choice while ogham dispatch is pending, causing both ogham effect and card choice to fire simultaneously. Violates bible s.2.2 (activate BEFORE choosing).
bugs_found.fix: Disable _buttons at start of _on_ogham_pressed, re-enable after dispatch completes (success or failure). Also changed activated_btn.disabled from false to true after successful activation (cosmetic: button shows checkmark but is no longer clickable).

overall_assessment: Cycle 11: 1 MEDIUM bug fixed (race condition in rune activation). WalkHUD enhanced with faction reputation display, turn counter, and animated PV flash. 26 total bugs fixed across 11 cycles.
